title: Clueless Expert
definition: A state of profound learning where one has a map but no comprehension of the territory; experiencing moments of enlightenment and frustration simultaneously.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Being in a new situation or learning something complex, feeling lost yet having insights that make everything seem clearer with each step.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A state of cognitive dissonance during the learning process where one has theoretical knowledge but lacks practical understanding and experiences flashes of comprehension amidst confusion.
difficulty_levels.expert: A unique state of mind that transcends the dichotomy between being knowledgeable and ignorant, characterized by a continual interplay between chaos and revelation, as one delves deeper into an unfamiliar subject or context.

extra_fields.insight: The paradoxical experience of being both clueless and insightful simultaneously during the learning process.
